title: Comms /review lens return (Phase 4)
description: Validates one lens of the perspective-diverse /review panel (_core/primitives/comms-panels.md Panel 3; SPEC-workflow-phases-2-5.md § 4c). Three read-only critics run in parallel — correctness, register, legal — each on the post-redaction draft; the orchestrator (never an agent) synthesizes the three returns. FLAG-only and advisory: a lens reports findings; it never authors corrected text and never auto-blocks. The legal lens is Read-only — it flags suspected overstatement for the human and a downstream refute-claim pass; it never asserts a statute is correct from training data (invariant #5). additionalProperties:false at every level; no replacement_text, no blocking.

lens.description: Which lens this return belongs to. correctness = does the draft match the decision it communicates (figures, effective dates, eligibility carried from the source recommendation); register = does the prose match the active C07 speaker register (tone_descriptors / do_words / dont_words); legal = does any claim overstate entitlement, misstate a pay-equity obligation, or assert a figure no source backs.

status.description: This lens's verdict. 'flag' surfaces above the human acknowledgment / approval-stage gate; it is advisory, not an auto-block. The human resolves before advancing.

findings.description: Findings under this lens. An empty array pairs with status 'pass'.

description.description: What is wrong and where. State the observation; never the replacement (FLAG-only). For the legal lens, flag suspected overstatement — never rewrite the legal sentence.

location.description: Where in the draft the finding applies.

severity.description: Advisory weight for the human — not a block trigger.
